title: 180cm Christmas Pine Garland - Realistic Real Touch Artificial Cypress Greenery for Xmas Holiday Mantle Fireplace Table Runner Centerpiece Home Decor (A, 5.9FT)
features: LIFELIKE & NATURAL DESIGN – This artificial Norfolk pine garland features a realistic pine cypress texture with vibrant green hues, mimicking real foliage to enhance your Christmas decor with a fresh, festive touch.
PREMIUM PE MATERIAL – Crafted from eco-friendly, soft yet durable PE material, this garland is flexible, weather-resistant, and long-lasting—ideal for both indoor and outdoor holiday decorations.

VERSATILE HOLIDAY DECOR – Perfect for Fireplace mantle decor, Winding around stair banisters,Adorning doorways or window frames,Centerpiece for dining tables or buffet displays,Pair with fairy lights, pinecones, or berries for extra festive flair.
GENEROUS 5.9 FT LENGTH – Ample coverage for various decorating needs. Easily bendable and adjustable to fit your desired space, from cozy home settings to grand event displays.
MULTI-OCCASION USE – Beyond Christmas, this garland enhances weddings, parties, offices, hotels, and retail displays—an elegant greenery accent year-round.
description: Product description Transform your home into a festive wonderland with this stunning 180cm Christmas pine garland. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, this artificial cypress greenery features realistic, real-touch foliage that captures the authentic look and feel of natural pine. The versatile garland is perfect for draping across mantles, adorning fireplaces, or creating an enchanting table centrepiece during the holiday season. Its generous length provides ample coverage for various decorating needs, while the lifelike branches add depth and dimension to your Christmas décor. The durable construction ensures your garland maintains its beauty throughout the festive period, requiring minimal maintenance whilst delivering maximum impact. Whether used as a standalone decoration or combined with lights and ornaments, this premium quality garland brings the timeless charm of traditional Christmas greenery to your home without the mess of real pine needles. Safety Warning CAUTION: Keep out of reach of children. This product contains small parts that may pose a choking hazard if ingested. Not intended for use by children under 3 years. Do not use near heat sources or open flames. For indoor and outdoor use. Keep away from moisture when not in use.
